意外穿越奥特昭和宇宙，凭借着金手指的馈赠，顾沉喜提光之巨人的力量。
然而拥有力量的顾沉并不想搞事情，只想好好地亲身经历一遍TV里的剧情，以回味自己逝去的童年。
但是随着顾沉经历的事情越来越多，其心中的想法也在悄无声息之间发生了转变。
并在不知不觉中，也成为了历史发展的一部分。
且看一个穿越者，是如何一步步成为历代防卫军的掌中宝心头肉，又是如何一步步在这精彩纷呈的奥特大宇宙上演属于自己的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/baf1ff9daa6bd3b3fbfa2120316f378e","author":"子恆","author_id":"","book_id":"7273462692302572606","book_name":"混在奥特宇宙当顾问","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#100828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7273462812913975870","read_count":"25869","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"4349020"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"2108","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,奥特同人,无女主,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o26b788752aca3514788f7872096e0ae3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779319011&x-signature=UVM6thG5Sbdrx9I8Bbefb7BQUXc%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"59182386201","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"134"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220716515211CF7BD0755C054DA8"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{
